page.title: Dubhe vs Mariah SX21: Cheapest Boat Hire in Puerto Banús

data.meta_description: Dubhe vs Mariah SX21: which is the cheapest boat hire in Puerto Banús? Compare 5-pax, 8m vs 6.4m boats at €749/2h. Book your budget charter today.
data.summary: A direct comparison of the two most affordable boat hire options in Puerto Banús: the Dubhe (8m, 5 pax) and the Mariah SX21 (6.4m, 5 pax). Both depart from Puerto Banús with skipper, fuel, and drinks included from €749 for 2 hours.
key_facts: Dubhe: 8m length, 5 pax capacity, departs Puerto Banús
Mariah SX21: 6.4m length, 5 pax capacity, departs Puerto Banús
Both boats priced from €749 for 2 hours (skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, VAT included)
Dubhe offers more deck space and a small cabin; Mariah SX21 is a bowrider with open seating
No hidden extras – all charters include licensed skipper, insurance, and Spanish IVA
Ideal for couples, small families, or groups of friends on a budget
Both boats can cruise to Cabopino, Cala del Faro, or along the Marbella coastline

faq.q: Which boat is cheaper, Dubhe or Mariah SX21?
faq.a: Both the Dubhe and Mariah SX21 are priced identically from €749 for 2 hours, including skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and VAT. There is no price difference between the two for the same duration.

faq.q: How many passengers can the Dubhe and Mariah SX21 hold?
faq.a: Both boats have a maximum capacity of 5 passengers. This includes all adults and children. The Dubhe is slightly longer at 8m, while the Mariah SX21 is 6.4m.

faq.q: What is included in the cheapest boat hire in Puerto Banús?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA at 21%. No extra charges.

faq.q: Can I swim or anchor with these boats?
faq.a: Yes, both the Dubhe and Mariah SX21 are suitable for swimming stops. Your skipper will anchor at a calm spot such as Cala del Faro or off Cabopino beach. Just let the skipper know your preference.

faq.q: Which boat is better for a couple?
faq.a: For a couple, the Mariah SX21 bowrider feels more intimate and sporty, with open seating at the front. The Dubhe offers a bit more deck space and a small cabin, which can be useful for storing bags or changing.

faq.q: Do I need a license to rent the Dubhe or Mariah SX21?
faq.a: No. Both boats come with a licensed skipper included in the price. You simply relax and enjoy the ride.

faq.q: Can I extend the charter duration on the day?
faq.a: Yes, extensions are possible subject to availability. Contact us via WhatsApp during your trip to arrange an extra hour or two. Pricing will be pro-rata based on the 2-hour rate.

faq.q: What is the cancellation policy for these boats?
faq.a: We offer flexible cancellation for weather-related issues. For personal cancellations, please check our terms at booking. Contact us via WhatsApp for any changes.

data.body_html:
Looking for the cheapest boat hire in Puerto Banús? The Dubhe and Mariah SX21 are our two most affordable options, both starting at €749 for 2 hours. This guide compares the 8m Dubhe against the 6.4m Mariah SX21 — two very different boats at the same price. Whether you're a couple or a small group of 5, you'll find everything you need to decide here.

Dubhe vs Mariah SX21: Key Differences at a Glance

  • Dubhe: 8m length, 5 pax, small cabin, more deck space, ideal for a relaxed cruise
  • Mariah SX21: 6.4m length, 5 pax, bowrider design, open front seating, sporty feel
  • Both depart from Puerto Banús and include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and VAT
  • Price: from €749 for 2 hours for either boat

Boat Specifications: Dubhe (8m, 5 pax)

The Dubhe is a compact motorboat measuring 8 metres in length, with a maximum capacity of 5 passengers. It features a small cabin below deck — useful for storing bags, changing, or escaping the sun. The deck layout offers a sociable seating area around a small table, plus a sunpad at the bow. It's a solid choice if you want a bit more space per person than a smaller bowrider.

Boat Specifications: Mariah SX21 (6.4m, 5 pax)

The Mariah SX21 is a 6.4-metre bowrider, purpose-built for fun on the water. Its open bow seating lets up to three passengers sit forward, facing the sea, while the helm and rear bench seat accommodate the skipper and others. There's no cabin — just pure, open-air boating. It feels sportier and more nimble than the Dubhe, perfect for short coastal hops.

Price Comparison: Both from €749/2h

Both the Dubhe and Mariah SX21 are priced identically. For a 2-hour charter, you pay €749. For a full day (8 hours), the price is €2,299. All prices include a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). There are no hidden costs. If you're on a tight budget, either boat works.

Which Boat Should You Choose?

Pick the Dubhe if you value a little extra space, a cabin for changing, and a more traditional deck layout. It's better for a small family or a group of friends who want to spread out. Pick the Mariah SX21 if you want a sporty, open-air experience with bow seating that puts you closer to the water. It's ideal for couples or small groups who plan to swim and sunbathe. Both boats depart from Puerto Banús and can cruise to Cabopino, Cala del Faro, or along the Marbella coastline.

What's Included in Every Charter

  • Licensed skipper
  • Fuel
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava
  • Light snacks
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish IVA (21%)

How to Book the Dubhe or Mariah SX21

Booking is simple. Visit our fleet page, select either the Dubhe or Mariah SX21, and contact us via WhatsApp. We'll confirm availability, duration, and any special requests. Both boats are based in Puerto Banús, so you'll start your trip from the heart of Marbella's most famous marina.

Frequently asked questions

Which boat is cheaper, Dubhe or Mariah SX21?

Both the Dubhe and Mariah SX21 are priced identically from €749 for 2 hours, including skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and VAT. There is no price difference between the two for the same duration.

How many passengers can the Dubhe and Mariah SX21 hold?

Both boats have a maximum capacity of 5 passengers. This includes all adults and children. The Dubhe is slightly longer at 8m, while the Mariah SX21 is 6.4m.

What is included in the cheapest boat hire in Puerto Banús?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA at 21%. No extra charges.

Can I swim or anchor with these boats?

Yes, both the Dubhe and Mariah SX21 are suitable for swimming stops. Your skipper will anchor at a calm spot such as Cala del Faro or off Cabopino beach. Just let the skipper know your preference.

Which boat is better for a couple?

For a couple, the Mariah SX21 bowrider feels more intimate and sporty, with open seating at the front. The Dubhe offers a bit more deck space and a small cabin, which can be useful for storing bags or changing.

Do I need a license to rent the Dubhe or Mariah SX21?

No. Both boats come with a licensed skipper included in the price. You simply relax and enjoy the ride.

Can I extend the charter duration on the day?

Yes, extensions are possible subject to availability. Contact us via WhatsApp during your trip to arrange an extra hour or two. Pricing will be pro-rata based on the 2-hour rate.

What is the cancellation policy for these boats?

We offer flexible cancellation for weather-related issues. For personal cancellations, please check our terms at booking. Contact us via WhatsApp for any changes.
